zh.lifeSummary: 當Basilia de Fleitel於大約1024年出生在英國賀福爾林頓時，她的父親Gérard de Flaitel51歲，母親Agnès d'Evreux40歲。她於1049年與Sir William de Talbot在英國英格蘭賀福爾林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1099年1月16日在法國諾門迪享年76歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾勒 貝-盧易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Basilia de Fleitel于大约1024年出生在英国賀福爾林頓时，她的父亲Gérard de Flaitel51岁，母亲Agnès d'Evreux40岁。她于1049年与Sir William de Talbot在英国英格兰賀福爾林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1099年1月16日在法国諾門迪享年76岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪艾勒 貝-盧易。

en.Le Bec-Hellouin, Departement de l'Eure,: Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Upper Normandy, France

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fleitel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Conrado, Humberto, Manuel, Ovidio, Pedro, Rafael, Agustin, Alfredo, Armando, Eulogio.
Spanish (mainly Cuba): altered form of Portuguese and Galician   Freitas   or of Spanish   Fleitas  .

variants.name: Freitas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Fernando, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Sergio, Armando, Augusto, Jorge, Juanita, Ana.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Marcio, Mateus, Paulo, Afonso, Agostinho, Caetano, Duarte, Guilherme, Henrique, Margarida.

Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of numerous places called Freitas, or a topographic name for someone who lived on a patch of stony ground, from Portuguese (pedras) freitas ‘broken stones’, Late Latin (petrae) fractae. Compare Fleitas .

nameMeanings.name: Basilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Pedro, Domingo, Roberto, Carlos, Ricardo, Albertino, Alejandro, Almario, Altagracia, Andres, Armando.  Portuguese Ilidio.  Italian Antonio, Gennaro, Anastasio, Federico, Marco, Quirino.
Italian; Portuguese (Basílio): from the personal name Basilio, Basílio, from Latin Basilius (see Basil ).

variants.name: Basil
meanings: From the Greek name Basileios ‘royal’ (a derivative of basileus ‘king’). This name was borne by St Basil the Great ( c.330–379 ), bishop of Caesarea, a theologian regarded as one of the Fathers of the Eastern Church. It was also the name of several early saints martyred in the East.

variants.name: Bacilio
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Peru): variant spelling of   Basilio  .

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Basilia de Fleitel was born about 1024, in Linton, Herefordshire, England, her father, Gérard de Flaitel, was 51 and her mother, Agnès d'Evreux, was 40. She married Sir William de Talbot in 1049, in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 16 January 1099, in Normandy, France, at the age of 76, and was buried in Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Basilia de Fleitel est née environ 1024, à Linton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Gérard de Flaitel, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Agnès d'Evreux, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Talbot en 1049, à Linton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1099, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Basilia de Fleitel um 1024 in Linton, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gérard de Flaitel 51 und ihre Mutter Agnès d'Evreux 40. Sie hat 1049 in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William de Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1099 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Basilia de Fleitel è nata il circa 1024 nel Linton, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Gérard de Flaitel, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Agnès d'Evreux, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Talbot nel 1049, nel Linton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 16 gennaio 1099, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Basilia de Fleitelが約1024年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリントンで生まれた時，父Gérard de Flaitelは51歳，母Agnès d'Evreuxは40歳であった。1049年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリントンでSir William de Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1099年1月16日にフランスノーマンディで76歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアル ベク-ヘロウインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Basilia de Fleitel(이)가 대략 1024년 영국 허퍼드실르 린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gérard de Flaitel(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès d'Evreux(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1049년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 린턴에서 Sir William de Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1099년 1월 16일 프랑스 노먼디에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 일 베c-헬루인에 묻혔다.

mn.Linton, Herefordshire, England: Linton, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Basilia de Fleitel nasceu aproximadamente 1024, em Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gérard de Flaitel, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Agnès d'Evreux, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Talbot em 1049, em Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1099, em Normandie, França, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Basilia de Fleitel родилась около 1024 г. в местности линтон, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gérard de Flaitel было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Agnès d'Evreux, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Talbot в 1049 г. в местности линтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 16 января 1099 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности л бек-хеллуин, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Basilia de Fleitel nació aproximadamente 1024, en Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gérard de Flaitel, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Agnès d'Evreux, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir William de Talbot en 1049, en Linton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 16 de enero de 1099, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
